problem:
filesystem: edit_file newText interpreted as String.prototype.replace replacement-pattern (literal $ corrupted). ## Summary
`edit_file` in `@modelcontextprotocol/server-filesystem` silently corrupts content containing literal `$` characters. The root cause is that `applyFileEdits` (in `src/filesystem/lib.ts`) invokes JavaScript's `String.prototype.replace(searchString, replacementString)` where the **second argument is interpreted as a [replacement string pattern](https://developer.mozilla.org/e (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
